title: SavannaCraft Modpack
body:
The main focus of this modpack is the Create Mod, but it aims to enhance ALL aspects of the game!  
  
It includes mods for Building, Ambience & Visuals, Adventure & Combat, and Quality of Life.  
  
If you're looking for a full modlist, select the newest version and look at "Dependencies".  
Every mod included in the modpack is listed there.
